title: Mal`akiy #4401
definition:
Malachi = "My messenger"

 1) the prophet who wrote the last book of the Old Testament; nothing
    else is known
nasbUsage:
Definition: Malachi = "My messenger"

 1) the prophet who wrote the last book of the Old Testament; nothing
    else is known

    NASB:  my messenger, an Isr. prophet
